name: Default
author: Jellyfin
description: The default Jellyfin look. No custom CSS is applied.

name: Abyss
author: Aumgupta
description: A clean and minimal theme for Jellyfin with frosted glass surfaces, refined typography, smooth animations and a minimal design language that re-skins JellyFin almost exhaustively.

vars.name: Abyss Radius
vars.description: Abyss radius.

name: BetterUI
author: TromoSM
description: A modern UI enhancement theme for Jellyfin focused on cleaner layout, smoother animations, and ios like design.

name: ElegantFin
author: lscambo13
description: A modern Jellyfin theme inspired by Jellyseerr. Brings fresh layouts, smooth animations, rounded corners, stylish borders, and hover effects. Works great on mobile, desktop, and TV with a single import.

vars.name: Footer Text
vars.description: Custom text displayed at the bottom of the dashboard.

vars.name: Background Base Color
vars.description: The darker/bottom color point of the main app background gradient.

vars.name: Background Top Color
vars.description: The lighter/top color point of the main app background gradient.

vars.name: Header Background Color
vars.description: Background color for the top navigation bar.

vars.name: Sidebar/Drawer Color
vars.description: Background color for the slide-out navigation drawer.

vars.name: UI Accent Color
vars.description: Primary accent color for progress bars, focused elements, and checkboxes.

vars.name: Active Item Color
vars.description: Color for active selected items and active menu options.

vars.name: Primary Text Color
vars.description: Main text color for the interface.

vars.name: Secondary Text Color
vars.description: Text color for secondary information like plot, year, and duration.

vars.name: Login Background URL
vars.description: Direct URL to an image used for the login screen background.

vars.name: Login Screen Title
vars.description: Text shown at the top of the login screen.

vars.name: Icon Pack
vars.description: Set to 'Material Icons Round' for new icons, or 'Material Icons' for classic.

vars.name: Clear Logo Visibility
vars.description: Set to 'block' to show movie/TV clear logos, or 'none' to hide them.

vars.name: Library Label Visibility
vars.description: Set to 'block' to show text labels on media library cards, or 'none' to hide them.

vars.name: Hover Card Buttons
vars.description: Set to 'block' to show watched/favorite buttons on hover, 'none' to hide.

vars.name: Item Title Visibility
vars.description: Set to 'block' to always show text title, 'none' to hide when logo exists.

vars.name: App Bar Height
vars.description: Use 5em for fading bar (seamless) or 4.6em for solid bar.

vars.name: Media Bar Plugin Support
vars.description: Enable additional styles for the Media Bar plugin.

vars.name: Custom Media Covers
vars.description: Enable alternate custom media cover styles.

name: GlassFin
author: KBH-Reeper
description: Built on ElegantFin, GlassFin adds a glassmorphism aesthetic with improved and reactive UI elements for a more modern and interactive experience. Available for mobile and desktop.

name: NeutralFin
author: KartoffelChipss
description: NeutralFin is a custom Jellyfin theme based on lscambo13's ElegantFin, featuring a sleek black and grey color scheme for a more neutral and modern look.

vars.name: Border Color
vars.description: Color of the border of elements.

vars.name: Background Gradient
vars.description: Gradient used for the background of the theme.

name: Ultrachromic (Monochromic Preset)
author: CTalvio
description: The final form of the chromic theme saga. A refined, highly customisable dark theme with backdrop support, hover glow effects, and a rich modular design. The monochromic preset is muted and minimal.

name: Jellyfish
author: n00bcodr
description: A Jellyfin theme inspired by Flow, Zesty and Ultrachromic. Features backdrop support, custom indicators, and a progress bar. Works best with Backdrops and Details Banner enabled.

name: ZestyTheme
author: stpnwf
description: A minimal and elegant theme for Jellyfin inspired by Ultrachromic, Glassmorphism, Scyfin, JellyTheme and Zombie. Supports 10.11+ with two login wallpaper options. Requires Backdrops enabled.

name: Scyfin
author: loof2736
description: A clean custom theme for Jellyfin WebUI. Comes in multiple color variants including Seafoam, Coral, Snow and OLED. This entry loads the default Seafoam variant.

name: Glassmorphism
author: alexyle
description: Bringing a modern, sleek glassmorphism design to Jellyfin, enhancing your media server's aesthetics with a frosted glass effect. Responsive and lightweight.

name: Finimalism 11
author: tedhinklater
description: A minimalist Jellyfin theme with a clean, stripped-back aesthetic. Simple and fast.

name: Finimalism 12
author: tedhinklater
description: A minimalist Jellyfin theme with a clean, stripped-back aesthetic. Simple and fast.

name: Dracula
author: derektata
description: A Jellyfin theme based on the iconic Dracula color palette. Deep purples, pinks, and greens for a developer-friendly dark aesthetic.

name: One Dark
author: derektata
description: A Jellyfin theme based on the One Dark color scheme popularized by Atom editor. Cool blues and muted tones for a clean coding-inspired look.

name: Gruvbox Dark
author: derektata
description: A Jellyfin theme based on the retro groove Gruvbox color palette. Warm earthy tones with high contrast for a comfortable viewing experience.

name: Tokyo Night
author: derektata
description: A Jellyfin theme based on the popular Tokyo Night color scheme. Cool blues and purples with neon accents for a vibrant nighttime aesthetic.
